cape-coral.neighborhoods: Downtown Cape Coral, Southwest Cape, Cape Harbour, Burnt Store, West Cape, Del Prado
cape-coral.meetingHighlights: Growing Gulf Coast meetings with active morning and evening groups; community-focused meetings in downtown and Cape Harbour.
cape-coral.transitInfo: Local bus service and regional highways; Southwest Florida International Airport (RSW) serves the region.

daytona-beach.neighborhoods: Daytona Beach Shores, Seabreeze, Daytona Boardwalk area
daytona-beach.meetingHighlights: Beachfront and boardwalk-area meetings with steady tourist-season attendance and evening speaker meetings.
daytona-beach.transitInfo: Votran bus service and regional road access; Daytona Beach International Airport (DAB) nearby.

fort-lauderdale.neighborhoods: Las Olas, Victoria Park, Flagler Village
fort-lauderdale.meetingHighlights: Diverse downtown and beach-area meetings with many Spanish-language and LGBTQ-friendly groups; active evening calendar.
fort-lauderdale.transitInfo: Broward County Transit, Sun Trolley, and Tri-Rail connections; Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL) for travel.

gainesville.meetingHighlights: Strong campus and college-town meetings with many student-oriented and late-evening groups; active service structure.
gainesville.transitInfo: Regional RTS bus service and campus shuttles; Gainesville Regional Airport (GNV) for regional flights.

jacksonville.neighborhoods: Downtown, Riverside, San Marco, Avondale, Southside
jacksonville.meetingHighlights: Large, active fellowship with many neighborhood meetings, bilingual groups, and speaker events across the metro area.
jacksonville.transitInfo: JTA buses and Skyway in downtown; Jacksonville International Airport (JAX) provides regional flights.

miami.neighborhoods: Downtown, South Beach, Brickell, Little Havana, Wynwood, Coconut Grove
miami.meetingHighlights: Extensive and diverse AA community with strong Spanish-language meetings, evening speaker events, and 24-hour groups in some neighborhoods.
miami.transitInfo: Metrorail, Metrobus, and Tri-Rail connections; Miami International Airport (MIA) and Fort Lauderdale (FLL) nearby.

orlando.neighborhoods: Downtown, Lake Eola, Mills 50, College Park, Winter Park
orlando.meetingHighlights: Vibrant downtown and tourist-area meetings with many evening and weekend speaker meetings; strong service structure and newcomer resources.
orlando.transitInfo: Lynx bus network and SunRail commuter connections; Orlando International Airport (MCO) for national and international flights.

pembroke-pines.neighborhoods: Pembroke Lakes, West Pembroke Pines, Miramar (adjacent), Pines Boulevard corridor, Whispering Pines, Chapel Trail
pembroke-pines.meetingHighlights: Suburban meetings with strong evening attendance and family-focused groups; many meetings held in community centers and churches.
pembroke-pines.transitInfo: Broward County Transit and regional bus routes; proximity to Fort Lauderdale-Hollywood International Airport (FLL).

st-petersburg.meetingHighlights: Active waterfront and downtown meetings with many evening options and a lively speaker-meeting calendar.
st-petersburg.transitInfo: PSTA buses and regional transit across Tampa Bay; St. Pete–Clearwater International Airport (PIE) nearby.

tallahassee.meetingHighlights: College-town meetings with many campus-oriented groups at FSU and FAMU; active midday and evening schedules.
tallahassee.transitInfo: StarMetro bus service and regional highways; Tallahassee International Airport (TLH) serves the area.

tampa-bay.neighborhoods: Downtown Tampa, Ybor City, St. Petersburg, Clearwater
tampa-bay.meetingHighlights: Extensive meeting network across the Bay area with many specialty meetings, strong evening schedules, and extensive service resources.
tampa-bay.transitInfo: HART buses, TECO streetcar in Tampa, and regional transit to St. Pete; Tampa International Airport (TPA) for flights.

sarasota.areaDescription: Sarasota and Manatee County Gulf Coast area
sarasota.neighborhoods: Downtown Sarasota, St. Armands Circle, Siesta Key, Gulf Gate, Bee Ridge, Lakewood Ranch
sarasota.meetingHighlights: Active Gulf Coast recovery community with meetings near downtown, St. Armands, and Siesta Key; strong snowbird-season attendance; many early-morning and evening groups at churches and clubhouses.
sarasota.transitInfo: SCAT bus service covers Sarasota County; Sarasota-Bradenton International Airport (SRQ); I-75 and US-41 (Tamiami Trail) access.

pensacola.areaDescription: Pensacola and Escambia County in the Florida Panhandle
pensacola.neighborhoods: Downtown Pensacola, East Hill, North Hill, Cordova Park, Pensacola Beach, Perdido Key
pensacola.meetingHighlights: Panhandle recovery hub with meetings throughout downtown and beach communities; strong military-connected fellowship near NAS Pensacola; active speaker and step-study traditions.
pensacola.transitInfo: ECAT bus service covers Escambia County; Pensacola International Airport (PNS); I-10 and US-98 Gulf Coast access.

fort-myers.areaDescription: Lee County city on the Caloosahatchee River
fort-myers.neighborhoods: Downtown River District, McGregor, Villas area, Cypress Lake, Fort Myers Shores, Tice vicinity
fort-myers.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve the broader Fort Myers-Cape Coral area with year-round and seasonal attendance.
fort-myers.transitInfo: LeeTran buses serve the city; Southwest Florida International Airport is southeast of Fort Myers.

west-palm-beach.areaDescription: Palm Beach County urban center on Florida's southeast coast
west-palm-beach.neighborhoods: Downtown, Northwood, Flamingo Park, El Cid, Westgate, Clematis Street corridor
west-palm-beach.meetingHighlights: Meetings are widely available across central Palm Beach County with strong downtown and neighborhood participation.
west-palm-beach.transitInfo: Palm Tran buses, Tri-Rail, Brightline nearby, and Palm Beach International Airport support regional access.

clearwater.areaDescription: Pinellas County Gulf Coast city west of Tampa
clearwater.neighborhoods: Downtown, Clearwater Beach, Countryside, Island Estates, Belleair border area, Coachman corridor
clearwater.meetingHighlights: Meetings serve beach communities and inland neighborhoods with a steady mix of daytime and evening formats.
clearwater.transitInfo: PSTA bus service links Clearwater to St. Petersburg and Tampa; St. Pete-Clearwater International Airport is nearby.
